channel.title: Blogs on Daniel's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Daniel's blog

item.title: Optimizing CPU GEMM step by step.
item.description:
Introduction: What is GEMM?

Let’s first define what a GEMM is and why it is relevant in today’s world. GEMM refers to General Matrix Multiplication, a linear algebra operation that can be defined as:

$$ C = \alpha AB + \beta C $$

Where A, B and C are matrices and alpha and beta are scalars. Most of the time the part we will focus on will be just A and B since multiplying two matrices is the biggest challenge.

item.title: Why you should Root your phone (and other things)
item.description:
What is rooting?

If you know what rooting is, you can safely skip this section. I will just briefly explain in simple terms what rooting is. If you kept reading I guess you are not much of a power user so let me give you an example using Windows as an analogy. I’m sure at some point you have needed to use the option in Windows that says “Run as an Administrator” perhaps to install software or for other various purposes.
